package rulefixtures

// scenario for csv_reader_reuse_record: `csv.NewReader(r)` without `ReuseRecord = true` when records are processed one at a time and not stored
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule475PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario475Positive(records []Rule475PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
